message:
Add vergen-powered build metadata generation via build.rs

This commit introduces a build script that uses the vergen crate to embed
build-time and cargo metadata into the binary at compile time. This enables
the application to report accurate version information, build timestamps,
and other compile-time details.

Changes:
- Add build.rs that configures vergen's BuildBuilder and CargoBuilder
- Gracefully handles vergen emit failures with stderr warnings
- Emitter pattern allows future extension for git metadata if needed

The build script uses vergen 9.x with minimal feature flags (build, cargo)
to keep compile times fast while providing essential build metadata.

This is foundational infrastructure for release tooling and user-facing
version reporting in the CLI help output.
